```{r}
library(readr)
library(here)
# Load the data
df <- read.delim("../data/RNAseq_data_forDE/TB_sample_metadata_classification.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
df$CONTRAST <- "MTB_control"
# Create SAMPLE_CONDITION from non-NA TISSUE, CELL, TIME_POINT
df$SIGNATURE_NAME <- apply(df[, c("series_id","CONTRAST","TIME_POINT","TISSUE", "CELL")], 1, function(x) {
  parts <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]  # exclude NA and empty strings
  if (length(parts) > 0) paste(parts, collapse = "_") else NA
})

df$TB <- "MTB"
df$SAMPLE_CONDITION <- apply(df[, c("series_id","TB","TIME_POINT","TISSUE", "CELL")], 1, function(x) {
  parts <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]  # exclude NA and empty strings
  if (length(parts) > 0) paste(parts, collapse = "_") else NA
})

# add paths to expression matrices
df$EXPRMAT_PATH <- paste0("data/RNAseq_data_forDE/expression_matrices/", df$series_id, ".tsv" )

write_tsv(df, file="~/Documents/GitHub/integrative-drugrep-tb/data/RNAseq_data_forDE/clean_TB_sample_metadata_classification.tsv")
```
